title: SKIPPED_SUSPICIOUS_ANSWER log payload
description: Structured payload for the pino `warn`-level log line emitted by `parseAnswersFromComments` (in `packages/orchestrator/src/worker/clarification-poster.ts`) when the FR-002 content-based skip fires. Indicates the defense-in-depth filter caught an answer whose captured text contains question-side markdown markup (`**Question**:` or `**Context**:`) — i.e., the answer was probably captured from a bot-authored questions comment that slipped past `isQuestionComment` (FR-001).

code.description: Machine-readable event code. Distinct from TRANSITION_WITH_QUESTION_HEADINGS so operator dashboards can count defense-working vs defense-failing separately.

commentId.description: GitHub numeric id of the offending comment. Operators can jump to it via https://github.com/OWNER/REPO/issues/N#issuecomment-{commentId}.

questionNumber.description: The question number for which the suspicious answer was captured (1-based, matches the `Q<n>` heading in clarifications.md).

excerpt.description: First 120 characters of the captured answer text. Truncated to keep log volume bounded across repeated poll cycles.
